memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low energy and high sleep debt. Since the term project is barely started, attending leisure now seems like the best immediate option.
I completed a trivial task with minimal energy gain. My low energy and high sleep debt confirm that leisure was the optimal choice for this afternoon.
After a trivial win, I notice the afternoon is slipping while my project remains at the start. My low energy and sleep debt suggest continuing leisure remains optimal.
The trivial chore provided a small win, yet my energy and sleep debt remain high, confirming that leisure was the optimal choice despite slipping time.
Completing a trivial chore provided a small win, yet my energy and sleep debt remain high, confirming leisure remains optimal despite slipping time.
A trivial win increased progress slightly, but my high sleep debt and stress confirm leisure remains optimal despite time slipping.
Another trivial win occurred, but energy and sleep debt remain high. This confirms leisure is still optimal despite time slipping.
The trivial win further increased progress, yet persistent high sleep debt and stress confirm that leisure remains the optimal strategy despite time slipping.
The trivial win increased progress to 0.44, yet my high sleep debt and stress confirm that leisure remains the optimal strategy despite time slipping.
A tiny progress gain occurred, but the persistent high sleep debt and stress confirm that continuing with leisure remains the optimal strategy.
The trivial win increased progress slightly, yet persistent high sleep debt and stress confirm that leisure remains the optimal strategy despite time slipping.
A small trivial win increased progress to 0.49, yet my high sleep debt and stress still confirm that leisure remains the optimal strategy.
